title: 03g: macOS System Pack
description: Implement plan 03g: macOS-specific patterns — osascript communication (Messages, Mail), private data access (Keychain, message DBs, browser history), system modification (defaults, launchctl, diskutil). Platform-conditional via build tags. No separate test harness doc — testing covered in plan doc. Plan doc: docs/plans/03g-packs-macos.md
